# Tauri Gotchas

> Known Tauri patterns that cause silent failures or hard-to-debug errors.

## Entries

- [Rust toolchain must be pre-installed](rust-toolchain.md): Tauri npm packages install but builds fail without system Rust installation. HIGH.
- [plugin-sql lastInsertId is number | undefined](lastinsertid-undefined.md): execute().lastInsertId typed as number | undefined causes type errors in typed wrappers. MEDIUM.
- [Migration UPDATEs silently fail when seed data does not exist yet](migration-updates-before-seed.md): Migrations run before seedData(), so UPDATEs matching seeded rows hit 0 rows and commit successfully. Use post-seed fixup functions instead. HIGH.
